heading.title: Upcoming programs, past work, and event-level details
heading.description: The event view is split into simple sections so visitors can read the schedule quickly on any screen.

upcomingSection.title: What is next on the trust calendar
upcomingSection.description: The most important dates stay visible as clean cards with enough detail to act on.

completedSection.title: Recent activity and visible completion
completedSection.description: A completed-events section reinforces trust by showing the work already delivered.

detailsSection.title: Recurrent programs and operational notes
detailsSection.description: These detail cards help donors and volunteers understand how events are structured.

eventDetails.title: Monthly outreach clinic
eventDetails.description: A rotating clinic providing basic consultations, referrals, and health guidance.

eventDetails.title: Scholarship selection review
eventDetails.description: Applications are screened by the program team and verified through community partners.

eventDetails.title: Volunteer service day
eventDetails.description: Hands-on events for food packs, awareness drives, school visits, and neighborhood support.
